title: Takht Sri Damdama Sahib
tagline: Takht Sri Damdama Sahib — heritage city of Punjab

overview.short: The Takht Sri Darbar Sahib Damdama Sahib, is one of the five takhts or Seat of Temporal Authority of Sikhism, located in Talwandi Sabo, near the city of Bathinda in Bathinda distri
overview.description: The Takht Sri Darbar Sahib Damdama Sahib, is one of the five takhts or Seat of Temporal Authority of Sikhism, located in Talwandi Sabo, near the city of Bathinda in Bathinda district of Punjab, India. At this place Guru Gobind Singh, the tenth Sikh Guru, prepared the full version of the Sikh scriptures called Sri Guru Granth Sahib in 1705. The other four Takhts are the Akal Takht Sahib, Takht Sri Keshgarh Sahib, Takht Sri Patna Sahib and Takht Sri Hazur Sahib.

topPlaces.name: Gurdwara Likhansar Sahib
topPlaces.description: Gurdwara Likhansar Sahib is an historical Gurdwara situated in Talwandi Sabo (District Bhathinda) in Punjab, India. This is adjacent to Takht Sri Damdama Sahib.

topPlaces.name: Talwandi Sabo
topPlaces.description: Talwandi Sabo (also known historically as Guru Kashi) is a town and Municipal Council, in Bathinda District, Punjab, India. It is famous for being the town in which one of the five Takhts of Sikhism where Takht Sri Damdama Sahib.

topPlaces.name: Behman Jassa Singh
topPlaces.description: Behman Jassa Singh is a village in Bathinda district in the northern Indian state of Punjab. It is located at longitude 74 56'E and latitude 30 12'N. Its postal pin code is 151302.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Takht Sri Damdama Sahib?
faq.a: The best time to visit Takht Sri Damdama Sahib is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Takht Sri Damdama Sahib?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (181 km) and the nearest railway station is Ludhiana Junction (127 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Takht Sri Damdama Sahib?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Takht Sri Damdama Sahib at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Takht Sri Damdama Sahib?
faq.a: Stays in Takht Sri Damdama Sahib start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Takht Sri Damdama Sahib?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gurdwara Likhansar Sahib, Talwandi Sabo, Behman Jassa Singh.
